hooks.name: Keep README in sync (on create)
hooks.description: When a new source file is created, update the README structure/pages/scripts sections.

action.prompt: A new project file was just created. Update README.md so its "Project structure", "Pages", and relevant feature/script sections reflect the new file. Only edit README.md, keep changes minimal and consistent with the existing style, and skip if the file is irrelevant to documentation (e.g. a temp or hook file). Do not modify any source files in response to this hook.
